AiShowcase.feedItem3Subtitle: Lead gen chatbot — 54 new leads today
AiShowcase.prop1Title: AI agents that work while you sleep
AiShowcase.prop1Body: We build and deploy AI bots for customer support, sales, lead generation, and internal operations across WhatsApp, Telegram, your website, and beyond.
AiShowcase.prop2Body: From CRM and ERP automation to workflow orchestration and reporting we map your processes and build systems that run them reliably, without manual effort.
AiShowcase.prop3Title: Software you own, built to last
AiShowcase.prop3Body: Every platform, dashboard, or mobile app we deliver is production-grade, documented, and fully yours. No vendor lock-in, no black boxes.

HowItWorks.title: How our AI Agent works
HowItWorks.description: Watch how our autonomous agent thinks, plans, and acts across your tools in real time.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Event fires from CRM, form, or webhook
HowItWorks.step2Desc: AI analyzes context and plans actions
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Calls APIs, creates tasks, sends messages
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Logs results and notifies the team
HowItWorks.idleDescription: Select a scenario on the left and press "Run agent" to watch it work in real time.
HowItWorks.sandboxDescription: Pick a scenario and watch the AI work step by step
HowItWorks.task1Thought1: New lead submitted from website form.
HowItWorks.task1Thought3: Lead is qualified – high enterprise potential.
HowItWorks.task1Result: Lead fully processed and assigned to sales team.
HowItWorks.task2Thought1: New support ticket: API rate limit issue.
HowItWorks.task2Action3: Generate draft reply from knowledge base
HowItWorks.task2Result: Ticket categorised and escalated. Suggested reply ready.
HowItWorks.task3Result: Report generated and delivered to leadership.

ConnectedModel.description: Sales, ads, and website numbers often sit in different apps, so it's hard to see how your business is really doing. We bring it together in one place. AI and dashboard both use the same numbers, so you never get two different answers.

meta.title: About automex AI Automation & Enterprise Software
meta.description: automex is a Seattle-based enterprise AI and software company. We build intelligent automation systems, custom software, and AI-powered products that help businesses worldwide move faster.
meta.keywords: about automex, AI automation company, enterprise software Seattle, AI agents, digital transformation, custom software team
meta.ogTitle: About automex Built to Automate the Future of Work
meta.ogDescription: From Seattle to the world automex designs and ships AI-powered automation, custom software, and enterprise products trusted by 50+ clients across 12 countries.

hero.description: automex is an enterprise AI and software company headquartered in Seattle, WA. We design and ship intelligent automation systems, custom software, and AI-powered products that free your team from repetitive work.

story.title: Started in Seattle. Built for the world.
story.pullQuote: We started automex because great AI and automation tools shouldn't be a privilege of the Fortune 500.
story.body1: In 2020, we launched out of Seattle with a single belief: that every business not just the biggest ones deserves access to enterprise-grade automation and AI. We started by solving real operational problems for SMBs and quickly discovered that the need was far wider than the Pacific Northwest.
story.body2: Today, automex operates from two continents, serving clients across 12 countries. Our team spans Seattle and Kabul, combining Silicon Valley-caliber engineering with the hunger and work ethic of a team that knows exactly what's at stake.

mission.missionBody: To make enterprise-grade AI automation accessible to every business from fast-growing startups to established enterprises so their teams can focus entirely on work that matters and decisions that move the needle.
mission.visionBody: A world where repetitive, manual business processes are fully automated. Where people spend their time thinking, creating, and leading not copy-pasting, formatting, or clicking through dashboards. We're building the infrastructure that makes that world possible.

stats.title: Trusted by teams around the world

values.title: Principles that drive every decision
values.description: These aren't posters on a wall. They're the filters we apply when making product decisions, choosing clients, and building systems that need to work five years from now.
values.v1Body: We reach for the best available tool AI, automation, or custom code not the most familiar one. Every project is an opportunity to raise the bar.
values.v2Body: We say what we'll do and do what we say. No black boxes, no hidden scope, no surprises on invoice day.
values.v3Body: We measure success in hours saved, revenue generated, and problems eliminated not in slides delivered or tickets closed.
values.v4Body: Your business goal is our goal. We work alongside your team as a technical co-pilot invested in the outcome, not a vendor shipping deliverables.
values.v5Body: Every line of code, every integration, every deployment is production-grade. We don't ship something we wouldn't run ourselves.
values.v6Body: Our team spans continents and time zones. We build products that work for every locale, language, and culture because the world is our market.

timeline.title: Five years of building
timeline.description: From a one-person consultancy in Seattle to a global AI and software company with clients on four continents.
timeline.m1Body: Launched as a boutique software consultancy focused on automation and custom web applications for SMBs in the Pacific Northwest.
timeline.m2Body: Delivered our first enterprise CRM automation and ERP integration engagements saving clients thousands of manual hours per year.
timeline.m3Body: Expanded into AI-powered products: intelligent chatbots, lead-generation agents, and data pipelines deployed across multiple industries.
timeline.m4Body: Opened engineering operations in Kabul, Afghanistan, extending our service footprint to clients across Asia, Europe, and the Middle East.
timeline.m5Body: Crossed 50 active clients. AI agents, SaaS platforms, mobile apps, and automation systems now trusted by teams on four continents.
timeline.m6Body: Shipping our most ambitious suite: end-to-end AI automation, multi-channel agent infrastructure, and enterprise dashboards built for scale.

team.title: The people behind automex
team.description: A small, senior team with deep expertise across AI, enterprise software, and product delivery. We stay lean on purpose it keeps us sharp and accountable.
team.m1Bio: Engineer turned entrepreneur. Miraj founded automex to bring enterprise-grade AI automation outside Silicon Valley. He leads product strategy, client relationships, and technical architecture across both offices.
team.m2Bio: Full-stack engineer turned technology executive. Hakim now oversees technical strategy, innovation, and engineering culture. He ensures every product automex ships is reliable, secure, and built to outlast the trends.
team.m3Bio: Abdullah is a backend and infrastructure specialist with 7+ years of experience building high‑throughput microservices and real‑time systems. He leads the engineering team in implementing robust, scalable solutions and champions code quality and performance.
